description:
Log in to Rocket.Chat using username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. In the #release-updates channel, create and send a snippet named 'rollback_procedure.sh' with the following content:

#!/bin/bash
# Emergency Rollback Script
# Use only when health checks fail > 3 times

echo "[WARN] Initiating rapid rollback..."
docker service update --rollback --update-failure-action pause my_app_stack
echo "[INFO] Rollback signal sent. Monitoring logs..."
timeout 60s docker service logs -f my_app_stack

metadata.expected_content:
#!/bin/bash

# Use only when health checks fail > 3 times

echo "[WARN] Initiating rapid rollback..."
docker service update --rollback --update-failure-action pause my_app_stack
